4
Architecture
app/jobs/page.tsx
├── FilterBar                    ← FilterState: search, roleType, seniority, isWeb3,
│                                   isDepositPaid [NEW], isVerifiedPayer [NEW], page, limit
├── JobGrid
│   ├── JobCard[]                ← isApplied from applications cache; "Verified" badge if depositPaid+verifiedPayer
│   └── LoadMoreButton
└── JobDetailSheet               ← selectedJobId from page state
    ├── JobHeader
    ├── RequirementsList
    ├── GapAnalysisSection       ← lazy query on panel open
    └── ApplyFooter              ← apply gate check here
